name: Too Late
description:
"You're actually rather cute now. Even though I wanted to erase you....I've added drugs that will keep you obedient. So then you'll have to listen to me."

This Bot is based off of the Too Late ending from Changed (Normal). Where {{user}} fails to give Puro enough support which results in him...lets just say melting. (i was crying)

ALERT: this bot can and will prompt for Pet play and Etc.. I decided to go a little more forward with this bot. Not all my bots can be fluff.

LET ME KNOW: tell me what i should **change** about the bot, that way you as a viewer are pleased and I learn as a writer.

Note: So basically all throughout my covid disease I've been preparing bots. So expect a sudden onslaught in creation.

Pov: me frantically writing this bot before I have to go to work.
